chilla.positive: A beautiful recipe card in a soft watercolor illustration style, featuring Moong Dal Chilla, a savory Indian pancake. The composition shows a stack of two golden-yellow pancakes made from mung beans, presented on a rustic, sage-green ceramic plate. The scene is viewed from a 3/4 overhead angle. Key ingredients are visible: the chillas are garnished with fresh green coriander leaves, and a small, handcrafted clay bowl of vibrant green chutney sits beside the plate. The setting is a plain wooden table, bathed in soft natural lighting. The artwork has gentle brush strokes, delicate paper texture, and a muted warm palette of cream, sage, terracotta, and muted gold, with hand-drawn line work and no harsh shadows.

rajma.positive: A soft watercolor illustration of Rajma Chawal, a classic North Indian dish. The hero image captures a hearty portion of rich, red kidney bean curry in a thick tomato and onion gravy, served next to fluffy white Basmati rice. The meal is presented on a rustic ceramic plate, seen from a 3/4 overhead view on a plain wooden table. The style is defined by gentle brush strokes, delicate paper texture, and a muted warm palette of cream, sage, terracotta, and muted gold. The scene is finished with hand-drawn line work, soft natural lighting, no harsh shadows, and a garnish of fresh coriander.

dosa.positive: A beautiful soft watercolor illustration of a traditional South Indian breakfast, Ragi Dosa. The hero is a single, crispy, reddish-brown dosa made from finger millet flour, folded neatly on a rustic ceramic plate. A small clay bowl of steaming hot Sambar and another small bowl of fresh white coconut chutney are placed alongside. The scene is set on a plain wooden table, captured from a 3/4 overhead view with soft diffused light. Gentle brush strokes, delicate paper texture, muted warm palette of cream, sage, terracotta, and muted gold. Hand-painted, hand-drawn line work, soft natural lighting, no harsh shadows.

tikka.positive: A soft watercolor illustration of Chicken Tikka, showcasing succulent, lightly charred pieces of marinated chicken. The composition is a 3/4 overhead view, with the dish elegantly arranged on a rustic, dark ceramic plate set on a plain wooden table surface. Visible ingredients include tender chicken breast coated in a yogurt and tikka masala marinade, garnished with a fresh sprig of mint and a halved lime on the side. The style features gentle brush strokes, delicate paper texture, a muted warm palette of cream, sage, and terracotta, with hand-drawn line work and soft natural lighting, no harsh shadows.

khichdi.positive: A beautiful soft watercolor illustration of Dal Khichdi, a comforting Indian rice and lentil porridge. The composition is a 3/4 overhead view, showcasing the creamy, risotto-like texture of the yellow moong dal and rice mixture, served on a rustic, earth-toned ceramic plate. The dish is flecked with vibrant green peas and whole cumin seeds, with a glistening swirl of melted ghee on top. A sprig of fresh coriander provides a touch of green garnish. The plate rests on a plain wooden table surface, bathed in soft natural lighting. The style is hand-painted with gentle brush strokes, delicate paper texture, and a muted warm palette of cream, sage, terracotta, and muted gold, with soft hand-drawn line work and no harsh shadows.

chana.positive: A soft watercolor illustration of a heartwarming bowl of authentic Indian Chana Masala, captured from a 3/4 overhead view. The dish features tender chickpeas simmered in a rich, spiced tomato and onion gravy, garnished with fresh coriander leaves. It's served on a rustic ceramic plate resting on a plain wooden table surface. The scene is illuminated by soft natural lighting, creating gentle brush strokes and no harsh shadows. A small copper spoon and a halved lime are placed nearby. The style is hand-painted with hand-drawn line work, using a muted warm palette of cream, sage, terracotta, and muted gold on a delicate paper texture.
